narrative: Telemachus proposes a red sail as a new Ithacan signal, but the scene leaves that custom outside canon until the creator decides.

utterances.text: If we make the red sail our signal, the harbor watch can rise before rumor reaches the hall.

proposals.summary: Add an original red-sail signal to creator canon.

rule.description: In this creator canon, Ithacans treat a returning ship's red sail as a signal to begin the royal harbor watch.
